app.title: NourishLog
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to continue tracking your meals
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.register.subtitle: Fill in your details to get started
meal.title: Calorie Lookup
meal.placeholder: Search for a dish to see its calorie breakdown.
result.dailyBasis: Based on a 2,000 kcal daily diet
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyHero: Head over to the calorie lookup to start logging.
history.title: Meal History
history.empty: No meals logged yet. Search for a dish to get started.
landing.subtitle: Search any dish, get instant calorie data powered by USDA, and keep a running log of everything you consume. No guesswork.
landing.feature1.title: Instant Lookup
landing.feature1.desc: Type a dish name, pick your servings, and get a full calorie breakdown in under a second.
landing.feature2.title: Daily Dashboard
landing.feature2.desc: See your running total for the day at a glance. Every search is automatically logged.
landing.feature3.title: Works Everywhere
landing.feature3.desc: Mobile-first design with dark mode. Track calories from your phone, tablet, or desktop.
landing.how.title: How it works
landing.how.step1.desc: Quick sign-up with just your name and email. Takes about 10 seconds.
landing.how.step2.desc: Enter the dish name and number of servings. We handle the rest.
landing.how.step3.desc: Get per-serving and total calorie counts sourced from USDA data.
landing.footer: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.
landing.bottomCta.title: Ready to take control?
landing.bottomCta.desc: Join thousands of people who track what they eat without the hassle. Free to use, no credit card needed.
